content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Xenia and Bit Operations". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/339/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers representing the array.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use bit manipulation to find the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
ans = 0
for i in range(10):
    cnt = [0, 0]
    for j in range(n):
        cnt[(a[j] >> i) & 1] += 1
    ans += min(cnt)
print(ans)
